section1.question: What is a doc stack?
section1.answer:
This is the number of documents you can share, print, download or sync per month. If your $t(terms:organization) reaches the limit, we'll automatically add another block of documents to your stack. Don't worry, administrators can turn auto-renew off in your billing settings.

Click your profile icon when you're in Lumin and you'll see how many docs you've used so far.

section2.question: Will I be forced to upgrade my existing plan?
section2.answer: We’ll never force you to upgrade your plan. We want you to work in the way that fits you best. We do want you to get the most out of Lumin though, which is why we recommend you check out the new plans.

section3.question: Will I get to use new features like edit PDF if I don’t upgrade?
section3.answer: No. These features are part of the new Lumin and won’t be included in your current plan. You’ll need to update to one of our new plans to get access to edit PDF, fillable forms and unlimited collaboration.
